fields.title: The Corner
fields.body: You're on your corner. A payphone that never rings. A bodega with bars on the windows. The city moves around you like you're not there. For now, that suits you fine.

fields.title: The Board
fields.body: A corkboard inside Sal's back room. Folded notes, burner numbers, job descriptions written in the kind of language that doesn't hold up in court. Someone's moving product. Someone needs muscle. Someone wants a problem to disappear.

fields.title: Sal's Bar
fields.body: The kind of bar that doesn't have a sign. Sal keeps the lights low, the bottles cheap, and his mouth shut. Half the city's criminal ecosystem runs through this place on any given night.

fields.label: Check the job board.
fields.arrival_flavor: You head into Sal's back room.

fields.label: Go to Sal's bar.
fields.arrival_flavor: You push through the unmarked door.

fields.label: Head back outside.
fields.arrival_flavor: You step back out onto the street.

fields.label: Head back outside.
fields.arrival_flavor: You leave Sal's and step back into the cold.
